subject: [PATCH 1/2] x86/virt/tdx: Use PFN directly for mapping guest private memory

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Raised concern about losing information when switching to PFN, suggesting a separate patch and highlighting potential issues with huge page patches.

reviews.author: Edgecombe, Rick P
reviews.summary: Expressed disagreement with the approach, suggesting dropping level and making it 4k only until huge pages are supported.

2026-03-19.patch_summary: Patch proposes to use PFN directly for mapping guest private memory in x86/virt/tdx, raising concerns about losing information and potential issues with huge page patches.
